questions.question: Which dentists in Washington Dc are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Dentists in Washington Dc with weekend hours include: Lorton Town Dental (Sat: 09:00-15:00 "by appointment only"), Neibauer Dental Care (Sat: 08:00-13:00), iSmile Dental Care (Sat: 09:00-15:00), Smile Studio (Sat: 09:00-18:00), Pine Dentistry & Braces (Sat: 09:00-14:00), Apex Dental Care (Sat: 09:00-14:00), Delite Dental, PLLC (Sat: 08:00-14:00), District Smiles (Sat: off) and 9 more. 17 total with weekend availability.
